ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., BTC, USD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  "is_crypto" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the currency is a cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the currency was added to the platform */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the currency information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the currency (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "target_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target currency */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate from base to target currency */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rate data */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate was recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades that contributed to this rate */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., 'API', 'Manual') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_target_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency pair */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "target_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target currency */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency pair (e.g., BTC/USD) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the currency pair (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the pair information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_pairs_target_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_pairs_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rate entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the pair */,
  "rate_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rate data */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical rate was recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades that contributed to this historical rate */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., 'API', 'Manual') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed (rate_id or history_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., 'success', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rate_history ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., 'source', 'description') */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source for the metadata (e.g., 'API', 'Manual') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_metadata_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert (e.g., 1% change) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., 'increase', 'decrease') */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last checked */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)
